stemHtml: While cruising at M 0.78, an airliner receives a TCAS RA climb command. The manoeuvre causes the angle of attack to temporarily increase. What is the effect on critical alpha?

options.a: Critical alpha decreases due to compressibility.
options.b: Critical alpha increases due to compressibility.
options.d: The RA must be ignored, due to the risk of immediate stall.
